summary.coachMessage: The strongest moves are swapping premium packaging and favoring local products with lower transport overhead.

recommendations.title: Swap bottled beverages for refillable glass
recommendations.explanation: Refillable options remove single-use aluminum and cut downstream disposal emissions.
recommendations.reason: Highest leverage because the basket contains several high-volume beverages.

recommendations.title: Choose local produce over long-haul produce
recommendations.explanation: Shorter supply chains reduce refrigeration and freight intensity while improving freshness.
recommendations.reason: A strong fit for the current basket because produce is a recurring category.

recommendations.title: Buy cleaning essentials in bulk refill packs
recommendations.explanation: Concentrated refill packs reduce packaging waste and simplify storage.
recommendations.reason: A practical step that keeps the household routine efficient.

recommendations.title: Switch to recycled paper towels and tissues
recommendations.explanation: Recycled fiber uses less virgin material and lowers lifecycle emissions.
recommendations.reason: Low-friction adoption because the change is familiar and easy to compare.
